ground_truth.title: Best Apps to Learn a Language in 2025 – Top 10 Picks
ground_truth.author: Christian Roth
ground_truth.main_content:
Using apps for language learning has many advantages. But the selection in 2025 is huge. So the question arises, which of the language learning apps is the right one for me? Our language learning expert Christian has addressed this question, and the result is a list of concrete recommendations for the best language learning apps for the year 2025.

We at talkREAL always test all language learning apps over several weeks so that we can particularly assess long-term motivation. In our view, this is enormously important and is decisive for our choice of the Top 10 language learning apps in 2025.

Especially with language learning apps, you can quickly pay too much with in-app purchases. Because most providers add the 30% fee of the respective app store on top of the prices. Those who go via the website of the corresponding provider save real money.

Mondly is the up-and-comer among language learning apps. Not yet very well known, but technically flawless and thanks to excellent motivational elements, you always feel like continuing to learn. Many exciting functions are combined. You can compete with other learners or simply go through the very well-designed language course. And currently, 41 different languages are supported!

2024 was the year when, thanks to artificial intelligence, a completely new form of language learning app entered the stage. These are so-called AI language tutors or AI conversation courses. In essence, you can talk and write as you wish from day one of learning. The AI guides the dialogue and corrects if necessary.

Langotalk particularly impressed us during our comprehensive testing. We even went so far as to call the app the new gold standard. Langotalk also offers the option to unlock the entire app with a one-time payment.

The selection of language learning apps in Apple’s App Store and Google’s Play Store is huge in 2025. From many dozens of different language programs, I have selected the 10 with which, in my view, one can achieve the best results.

The top 10 ranking: 1. Mondly (Test Winner), 2. Langotalk, 3. Mosalingua, 4. Gymglish, 5. Rocket Languages, 6. Rosetta Stone, 7. Busuu, 8. Yabla, 9. Babbel, 10. Duolingo.

Which app it should ultimately be for whom depends, of course, a) on the personal learning type and b) on one's own challenges. Most apps can be tried for free and bought if liked.
